title: 🏷️ TRACK LAYOUT
data_structure:
```typescript
[
    {
        name: 'name',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'GP Circuit',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'year_from',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 1967,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'year_to',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 1999,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'length',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 5.397,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'length_unit',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'km',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'direction',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'clockwise',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'elevation_change',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 73,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'elevation_change_unit',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'm',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'surface',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'asphalt',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
]
```
